docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2021 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ENGELEN, MICHELLE HEARING SET FOR SEP-08-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2021 - JUDGMENT.
